content.query:
USE gold_saleslt;
GO

-- ── SALES KPI 1 — Daily Sales Summary ────────────────────────
CREATE OR ALTER VIEW salesDW.kpi_daily_sales AS
SELECT
    f.order_date_key                              AS order_date,
    COUNT(DISTINCT f.sales_order_id)              AS total_orders,
    SUM(f.order_qty)                              AS total_items_sold,
    ROUND(SUM(f.line_total), 2)                   AS daily_revenue,
    ROUND(AVG(f.line_total), 2)                   AS avg_line_value,
    ROUND(AVG(CAST(f.days_to_ship AS FLOAT)), 1)  AS avg_days_to_ship
FROM salesDW.fact_sales f
GROUP BY f.order_date_key;
GO

CREATE OR ALTER VIEW salesDW.kpi_monthly_revenue AS
SELECT
    d.year,
    d.month_number,
    d.month_name,
    d.month_year,
    d.quarter_label,
    COUNT(DISTINCT f.sales_order_id)              AS total_orders,
    SUM(f.order_qty)                              AS total_qty,
    ROUND(SUM(f.line_total), 2)                   AS monthly_revenue,
    ROUND(AVG(f.order_total_due), 2)              AS avg_order_value,
    ROUND(AVG(CAST(f.days_to_ship AS FLOAT)), 1)  AS avg_days_to_ship
FROM      salesDW.fact_sales f
JOIN      salesDW.dim_date   d
       ON f.order_date_key = d.date_key
GROUP BY  d.year, d.month_number, d.month_name,
          d.month_year, d.quarter_label;
GO

CREATE OR ALTER VIEW salesDW.kpi_product_performance AS
SELECT
    p.product_name,
    p.price_range,
    p.product_status,
    p.gross_margin                                AS unit_gross_margin,
    COUNT(DISTINCT f.sales_order_id)              AS total_orders,
    SUM(f.order_qty)                              AS total_qty_sold,
    ROUND(SUM(f.line_total), 2)                   AS total_revenue,
    ROUND(AVG(f.discount_rate) * 100, 2)          AS avg_discount_pct,
    ROUND(SUM(f.order_qty) * p.gross_margin, 2)   AS est_gross_profit
FROM      salesDW.fact_sales  f
JOIN      salesDW.dim_product p
       ON f.product_key = p.product_key
      AND p.scd_is_current = 1
GROUP BY  p.product_name, p.price_range,
          p.product_status, p.gross_margin;
GO


CREATE OR ALTER VIEW salesDW.kpi_daily_leads AS
SELECT
    created_date_key                              AS activity_date,
    COUNT(*)                                      AS new_leads,
    ROUND(AVG(CAST(lead_score AS FLOAT)), 1)      AS avg_lead_score,
    SUM(CASE WHEN is_converted = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS conversions,
    ROUND(
        SUM(CASE WHEN is_converted = 1 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0 END)
        / COUNT(*) * 100, 1
    )                                             AS conversion_rate_pct,
    ROUND(SUM(estimated_value), 2)                AS pipeline_value
FROM salesDW.fact_marketing
GROUP BY created_date_key;
GO

CREATE OR ALTER VIEW salesDW.kpi_monthly_campaign_roi AS
SELECT
    d.month_year,
    d.month_number,
    m.campaign_id,
    COUNT(*)                                      AS total_leads,
    SUM(CASE WHEN m.is_converted = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS converted,
    ROUND(
        SUM(CASE WHEN m.is_converted = 1 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0 END)
        / COUNT(*) * 100, 1
    )                                             AS conversion_rate_pct,
    ROUND(AVG(CAST(m.lead_score AS FLOAT)), 1)    AS avg_lead_score,
    ROUND(SUM(m.estimated_value), 2)              AS total_pipeline_value,
    ROUND(SUM(
        CASE WHEN m.is_converted = 1
             THEN m.estimated_value ELSE 0 END
    ), 2)                                         AS converted_value
FROM      salesDW.fact_marketing m
JOIN      salesDW.dim_date       d
       ON m.created_date_key = d.date_key
GROUP BY  d.month_year, d.month_number, m.campaign_id;
GO


CREATE OR ALTER VIEW salesDW.kpi_lead_funnel AS
SELECT
    lead_status,
    lead_quality,
    COUNT(*)                                      AS total_leads,
    ROUND(AVG(CAST(lead_score AS FLOAT)), 1)      AS avg_score,
    ROUND(AVG(estimated_value), 2)                AS avg_deal_value,
    ROUND(SUM(estimated_value), 2)                AS total_pipeline,
    ROUND(
        COUNT(*) * 100.0
        / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER (), 1
    )                                             AS pct_of_total
FROM salesDW.fact_marketing
GROUP BY lead_status, lead_quality;
GO


-- ── Quick test ────────────────────────────────────────────────
SELECT TOP 10 * FROM salesDW.kpi_daily_sales       ORDER BY order_date DESC;
SELECT TOP 10 * FROM salesDW.kpi_monthly_revenue   ORDER BY year, month_number;
SELECT TOP 10 * FROM salesDW.kpi_product_performance ORDER BY total_revenue DESC;
SELECT TOP 10 * FROM salesDW.kpi_daily_leads       ORDER BY activity_date DESC;
SELECT TOP 10 * FROM salesDW.kpi_monthly_campaign_roi ORDER BY month_number;
SELECT TOP 10 * FROM salesDW.kpi_lead_funnel       ORDER BY avg_score DESC;
GO
